description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a gable roof, surrounded by a well-landscaped yard featuring various trees and shrubs. The structure has a prominent front entrance, flanked by symmetrical windows and a small porch area. The roof is dark gray, contrasting with the light-colored exterior walls, and the house sits adjacent to a paved road. The landscaping includes a mix of flowering and leafy trees, providing a lush, suburban feel. The windows are arranged symmetrically on the front facade, and the overall design is compact and inviting. The property is bordered by a sidewalk and driveway, typical of residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gable roof, symmetrical windows, and lush landscaping, set beside a paved road.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, and a small porch, with landscaping and the road in front.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the roof shape, overall footprint, and the arrangement of trees and shrubs around the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional landscaping, and the continuation of the road behind the property.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing the side yard, driveway, and the distribution of trees and shrubs along the property edge.
